subject: Sophia from Final Fantasy Legends — a small child-like figure in a white cat-eared costume with a floral crown
description: A small, chibi-proportioned female figure stands with both arms slightly raised and hands open, wearing a white full-body costume with pointed cat-ear accents tipped in red. A wreath or crown of white flowers adorns her head, and a teal ribbon or bow is tied at her neck. She wears bright red gloves and dark shoes. Her expression is earnest and wide-eyed. The background shows a ghosted, larger version of the same figure in pale tones — another FFTCG compositional double. The overall palette is pastel and soft. The card frame identifies the character as Sophia from Final Fantasy Legends with the job type Devout. The ice/water element indicator appears in the cost pip.
foreground: small chibi figure in white cat-ear costume with floral crown and red gloves
background: soft ghosted figure, pale pastel wash
emotion: earnest, wide-eyed — open arms suggest offering or appeal
